subject: A skeletal undead figure rising from a pool or pit, draped in tattered ceremonial robes, surrounded by murky atmosphere and faint ghostly light
description: The art shows a hooded, gaunt skeletal figure emerging from a dark pool or sunken pit — the Eldest, reborn. Tattered robes cling to the bony frame, and the surrounding void is a wash of murky greens, browns, and sickly yellows. The composition is dim and oppressive, with the figure rising centrally as though summoned from below, faint pale highlights catching the skull and bony hands. The framing is tight enough to read as portrait-style but the figure is mid-action, mid-rise, lending narrative weight. The art panel itself sits in a black-bordered Saga frame with three Roman-numeral chapter abilities visible to the right.
foreground: skeletal undead figure rising from a pit, draped in tattered robes
background: murky void / sunken pit with sickly atmospheric haze
